description: The file is a Flutter application's main source file, defining app initialization, UI components, and backend connectivity checks.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: Main StatelessWidget defining the application's theme and home page.

classes.name: StatusPage
classes.description: StatefulWidget representing the main status UI with backend connectivity check.

classes.name: _StatusPageState
classes.description: State class managing backend health check logic and UI updates.

methods.name: backendBaseUrl
methods.description: Determines the backend URL based on platform (Android/emulator or others).

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes state and triggers the backend check on widget load.

methods.name: _checkBackend
methods.description: Performs an HTTP GET request to verify backend availability and updates UI accordingly.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Constructs the UI for the status page, displaying backend health status.
